title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not gonna be that easy, huh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Even the buster call pales before this!!!

dialogue.text: Don't get impertinent with me, youngsters.
